name: Chicken Paprikash Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb boneless, skinless chicken breast, in 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Prepare pie crusts according to package instructions for a two-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook bacon until crisp. Reserve 1 tablespoon drippings with the bacon on the skillet.
3. Add chicken to the skillet; cook and stir until no longer pink. Add onions, bell pepper, and carrots; cook and stir until vegetables are tender. Stir in peas.
4. In a small bowl, combine all remaining ingredients; mix well. Stir into the chicken mixture in the skillet. Spoon into the crust-lined pan. Top with the second crust and flute the edges. Cut slits or small designs in several places on top of the crust.
5. Bake at 425°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Cover the edge of the crust with strips of foil after 10 to 15 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
